rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BERNARD CLELAND
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Court Determination Of Estate Beneficiaries And Distribution Rights
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/8/16. A courtesy paper copy of all electronically filed documents requiring Court review or action needed to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T]. In addition, the petition must be amended to request specific findings; a request that the court choose a particular course of action is insufficient.
